assertions.title: Cmd+K focuses the search bar
assertions.reason: Cmd+K focus check returned true on /, /hierarchy, /spreadsheet, /kanban, and /compare.

steps.action: Open each of the 5 view routes and press Cmd+K
steps.expected: Search input gets focus and is ready for typing
steps.observed: Focus verification script returned true on all 5 routes

evidence.network: No API calls required for focus-only shortcut validation

assertions.title: Search filters employees in current view
assertions.reason: Typing a query in search immediately filtered visible employees to matching names only.

steps.action: In Org Chart route, enter search query "Alice"
steps.expected: Current view filters to matching employee(s) in real time
steps.observed: Only Alice KeyG2 remained visible; Bob KeyG2 was hidden

steps.action: Clear query, trigger Cmd+K, and type "Bob"
steps.expected: Current view re-filters to Bob match

evidence.network: No API calls required for client-side filtering behavior

assertions.title: Shortcuts work across all 5 views
assertions.reason: On all 5 routes, Cmd+K focused search, Backspace opened delete confirmation for selected employee, and Cmd+Z restored deleted employee.

steps.expected: Search receives focus from every view
steps.observed: Focus verification returned true for all 5 routes

steps.action: For each route, select Bob KeyG2 and press Backspace
steps.observed: Delete confirmation dialog appeared on each route

steps.action: Confirm delete, then press Cmd+Z on each route
steps.expected: Undo restores Bob KeyG2 regardless of active view
steps.observed: Bob KeyG2 was restored after Cmd+Z on each route

evidence.network: DELETE /api/employees/:id observed for Backspace deletions; POST /api/scenarios/:scenarioId/employees observed during undo restores

frictions.description: Clicking employee name text enters inline edit mode, so Backspace edits text instead of triggering delete shortcut.
frictions.resolution: Selected the employee card/row container before pressing Backspace.

summary: Tested 3 assertions (VAL-KEY-001, VAL-KEY-002, VAL-KEY-007): all passed in namespace coreux_key_g2 with required screenshot and console/network evidence.
